title: Agent Initialization and Startup
interaction_flow: agentmain module load → load_tool_schema(): open('assets/tools_schema{suffix}.json') → json.loads() → sets global TOOLS_SCHEMA
agentmain module load → creates memory dirs (mem_dir, mem_txt, mem_insight) if missing
agentmain module load → initialises CDP config at 'assets/tmwd_cdp_bridge/config.js' if missing
__main__ → GeneraticAgent.__init__()
GeneraticAgent.__init__() → os.makedirs('temp', exist_ok=True)
GeneraticAgent.__init__() → 'from llmcore import mykeys' triggers llmcore.__getattr__('mykeys')
llmcore.__getattr__('mykeys') → _load_mykeys(): try import mykey module; fallback read mykey.json → returns dict of keys/configs
llmcore.__getattr__('mykeys') → resolves proxy from mk.get('proxy') → sets globals mykeys, proxies
GeneraticAgent.__init__() → iterates mykeys.items() filtering keys containing 'api'|'config'|'cookie'

[if 'native' in k and 'claude' in k] → NativeClaudeSession(cfg=cfg).__init__: super(BaseSession).__init__(cfg) → sets api_key, api_base, model, context_win=28000, history=[], system='', name, proxies, reasoning_effort, thinking_type; sets _session_id/UUID, _account_uuid, _device_id
[if 'native' in k and 'oai' in k]   → NativeOAISession(cfg).__init__: calls NativeClaudeSession.__init__
[if 'claude' in k]                  → ClaudeSession(cfg).__init__: BaseSession.__init__(cfg)
[if 'oai' in k]                     → LLMSession(cfg).__init__: BaseSession.__init__(cfg)
[if 'mixin' in k]                   → appends {'mixin_cfg': cfg} placeholder
NativeClaudeSession/NativeOAISession → wrapped in NativeToolClient(backend)

NativeToolClient.__init__(backend): calls _thinking_prompt() → returns THINKING_PROMPT_EN or THINKING_PROMPT_ZH (based on GA_LANG env var); sets backend.system = thinking_prompt; sets self.name, self._pending_tool_ids=[]
ClaudeSession/LLMSession → wrapped in ToolClient(backend, auto_save_tokens=True): sets self.backend, last_tools='', name, total_cd_tokens=0

GeneraticAgent.__init__() → resolves mixin placeholders: MixinSession(all_sessions, mixin_cfg).__init__: selects backend sessions by llm_nos, validates same group, patches primary.raw_ask with _raw_ask; wraps in NativeToolClient or ToolClient
GeneraticAgent.__init__() → self.llmclients = [ToolClient/NativeToolClient, ...]
GeneraticAgent.__init__() → self.llmclient = self.llmclients[0]  (default active client)
GeneraticAgent.__init__() → initialises: lock=threading.Lock(), history=[], task_queue=Queue(), is_running=False, stop_sig=False, llm_no=0, handler=None, verbose=True
__main__ → agent.next_llm(args.llm_no): rotates llm_no, copies backend.history to new client, calls load_tool_schema('_cn') or load_tool_schema() based on model name
__main__ → threading.Thread(target=agent.run, daemon=True).start()  ← agent now ready to receive tasks
[On first task in agent.run()] → get_system_prompt(): reads 'assets/sys_prompt{lang_suffix}.txt', appends date string, calls get_global_memory() → returns full system prompt string
[On first task] → sys_prompt passed into agent_runner_loop(llmclient, sys_prompt, user_input, handler, TOOLS_SCHEMA, max_turns=40)
key_relationships: GeneraticAgent depends_on load_tool_schema (module-level on import, also in next_llm())
GeneraticAgent composes list[ToolClient | NativeToolClient] as self.llmclients
ToolClient wraps BaseSession subclass (ClaudeSession, LLMSession) as .backend
NativeToolClient wraps NativeClaudeSession/NativeOAISession/MixinSession as .backend; sets backend.system to thinking_prompt on init
MixinSession aggregates multiple BaseSession backends with fallback/retry logic
NativeClaudeSession extends BaseSession; NativeOAISession extends NativeClaudeSession
ClaudeSession extends BaseSession; LLMSession extends BaseSession
get_system_prompt() depends_on get_global_memory() from ga module

key_methods.load_tool_schema(suffix=''): Opens assets/tools_schema{suffix}.json; replaces 'powershell'→'bash' on non-Windows; sets global TOOLS_SCHEMA
key_methods._load_mykeys(): Tries 'import mykey' module; if ImportError reads mykey.json; raises if neither found
key_methods.llmcore.__getattr__(name): Lazy-loads 'mykeys' and 'proxies' globals on first access; calls _load_mykeys()
key_methods.BaseSession.__init__(cfg): Parses cfg dict: apikey, apibase, model, context_win, history=[], system='', name, proxy, max_retries, connect_timeout, read_timeout, reasoning_effort, thinking_type, thinking_budget_tokens, api_mode, temperature, max_tokens, stream
key_methods.NativeToolClient._thinking_prompt(): Returns THINKING_PROMPT_EN if GA_LANG=='en' else THINKING_PROMPT_ZH (action protocol with <thinking>/<summary> tags)
key_methods.NativeToolClient.set_system(extra_system: Combines extra_system with thinking_prompt; sets backend.system
key_methods.get_system_prompt(): Reads sys_prompt{lang_suffix}.txt + appends Today date string + get_global_memory()
key_methods.GeneraticAgent.next_llm(n=-1): Cycles llm_no; copies backend.history; calls load_tool_schema('_cn') for glm/minimax/kimi models
key_methods.GeneraticAgent.__init__(): Creates temp dir, loads mykeys, constructs session objects, resolves mixin sessions, sets llmclients[0] as active

important_notes: TOOLS_SCHEMA is a module-level global in agentmain.py; loaded immediately on import via load_tool_schema()
mykeys is lazy-loaded in llmcore via __getattr__ — not loaded until GeneraticAgent.__init__ first accesses it
NativeToolClient overrides backend.system immediately in __init__ with thinking_prompt (not the user system prompt)
User system prompt (get_system_prompt) is built fresh on EACH task execution in agent.run(), not during __init__
t_system_prompt in IR refers to NativeToolClient._thinking_prompt() / set_system() which configures structured reasoning protocol
'neraticAgent' in diagram plan = GeneraticAgent (IR artifact name, minor variation)
GA_LANG env var ('zh' or 'en') controls language of system/thinking prompts; set at module top based on locale
MixinSession resolves after initial session list construction: replaces dict placeholders in llm_sessions
Agent thread is daemon=True — started after __init__ and next_llm() calls
